allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --project C:\\Users\\Decla\\Repos\\clear_skies\\src\\ClearSkies.Game --no-build" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\Decla\\Repos\\clear_skies\\_err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\Decla\\Repos\\clear_skies\\_out.log" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; if\(!$p.HasExited\){ Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "killed after 12s \(was still running = good\)" } else { "exited early with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" })
